_comment: OData V2 PATCH — update PO item quantity. Two separate PATCH requests are required: one for the item, one for the schedule line. Both must be sent; SAP will not auto-sync them.
_notes: The CSRF token must be fetched first with GET /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/ and header X-CSRF-Token: Fetch.
The token is returned in the response header X-CSRF-Token and is valid for the session.
A_PurchaseOrderItem.OrderQuantity and A_PurchaseOrderScheduleLine.ScheduleLineOrderQuantity must match; mismatched values result in a partial delivery flag inconsistency.
If a PO item has multiple schedule lines, patch each schedule line individually, distributing the total quantity across them.
Updating NetPriceAmount or DocumentCurrency on a confirmed PO requires the item to be in a non-blocked state (DeletionIndicator = '' and GoodsReceiptIsExpected = true).
After a successful PATCH, perform a GET to confirm SAP accepted the values — SAP sometimes adjusts quantities to match rounding profiles or unit of measure conversions.
